tester.role: automated fontTools inspection with human result review

input: Fraunces[SOFT,WONK,opsz,wght].ttf from Google Fonts commit ac502d8eff76ef4d9477cdcc8ef7d0c84fde5372.
steps: Download the exact TTF from the pinned Google Fonts source commit.
Inspect name, version, OS/2 fsType, fvar axes, cmap, GSUB/GPOS feature tags, and required currency code points.
Compare advance widths of base digits zero through nine.
expected: File parses cleanly and exposes identity, embedding flag, axes, binary coverage, features, currency glyphs, and numeral behaviour.
actual: Parsed as Fraunces version 1.000. fsType was 0. Axes were optical size 9–144, weight 100–900, softness 0–100, and wonk 0–1. Selected Latin checks passed; Greek and Cyrillic did not. INR, USD, EUR, GBP, and JPY were present. Base digits were proportional and no tabular-figure feature was found in the inspected file.

artifacts.description: Candidate metadata derived from this inspection

notes: Pass covers binary inspection only. The family remains display-only in this collection until visual, axis-preset, application, and human review pass.
followUp: Choose restrained axis presets, inspect italics and static files, and run the full specimen and application matrix.
